summary: Tested Multi-Page Batch Crawl v1 for Growth Engine. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Batch crawl mode toggle, max_pages input, batch summary banner, and BFS crawl all work correctly.

test_classes: TestCrawlAuth (1 test) - POST /api/growth/crawl without auth returns 401
TestSingleModeCrawl (2 tests) - Default mode is single, explicit mode=single works
TestBatchModeCrawl (4 tests) - Batch returns summary, respects max_pages, stays on hostname, handles no-internal-links sites
TestBatchCrawlDataStorage (3 tests) - Batch pages have crawl_mode='batch' and parent_seed_url, single pages have crawl_mode='single'
TestBatchCrawlValidation (2 tests) - Invalid mode returns 400, max_pages capped at 25
TestExistingFunctionality (3 tests) - Pages/personas/trends list all still work

features_tested.feature: Max pages input appears in Batch mode
Max pages input hidden in Single mode
Button text changes to 'Batch Crawl (up to N)'
Button text changes to 'Crawl & Extract' in single mode
Pages list refreshes after batch crawl
Analyze SEO button visible in detail view
Generate Drafts button visible in detail view

batch_crawl_verification.mode_toggle: Single Page / Batch Crawl buttons work correctly
batch_crawl_verification.max_pages_input: Appears only in batch mode, default value 10
batch_crawl_verification.button_text: Changes between 'Crawl & Extract' and 'Batch Crawl (up to N)'
batch_crawl_verification.batch_summary: Shows pages_saved, pages_failed, pages_attempted after batch crawl
batch_crawl_verification.bfs_crawl: Discovers internal links and crawls them (httpbin.org -> /forms/post)
batch_crawl_verification.hostname_restriction: Only crawls same hostname, skips external links

seed_data_creation: Used existing pages from previous iterations. Batch crawl created new pages from httpbin.org during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Page Batch Crawl v1 fully tested. POST /api/growth/crawl now supports mode (single|batch) and max_pages parameters. Batch mode uses BFS to discover internal links, stays on same hostname, skips non-HTML assets, deduplicates URLs, and has 10s timeout per page. Frontend has mode toggle buttons, max_pages input (only in batch mode), and batch summary banner showing pages_saved/failed/attempted. Stored pages include crawl_mode and parent_seed_url fields. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_batch_crawl.py
